scripts.docs:generate: mkdir -p docs/.generated && cargo run --quiet -p lintai-cli --bin render-site-catalog > docs/.generated/catalog.json.tmp && mv docs/.generated/catalog.json.tmp docs/.generated/catalog.json && cargo run --quiet -p lintai-cli --bin render-security-rule-catalog > docs/SECURITY_RULES.md.tmp && mv docs/SECURITY_RULES.md.tmp docs/SECURITY_RULES.md
scripts.docs:check: npm run docs:generate && cargo test -q -p lintai-cli site_catalog -- --nocapture && cargo test -q -p lintai-cli --test docs_contract -- --nocapture && vitepress build docs
scripts.docs:dev: npm run docs:generate && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:generate && vitepress build docs
